about.label: About Me
about.title: The Person Behind the Work
about.mainDescription: I am Muliady Putra — a multidisciplinary digital professional from Indonesia 🇮🇩. I bridge the gap between beautiful design and functional engineering, delivering end-to-end digital solutions for clients worldwide.
about.quote: I am a multidisciplinary digital professional bridging the gap between beautiful design and functional engineering. From flawless UI to reliable backend support — I deliver end-to-end digital solutions.
about.passionate: Passionate about clean code, wise UX, and building things that actually work for real people.
about.aboutexperiencetitledesc: Roles, responsibilities, and academic foundation that shaped my professional expertise.

service.label: Services
service.title: How I Can Help You
service.description: Core services I offer — tailored to your needs, delivered with precision and care.

servicedata.title: Data Entry & Cleaning
servicedata.desc: Accurate data entry, formatting, validation, and cleaning for spreadsheets, documents, and databases.

servicedata.title: Spreadsheet Management & Reporting
servicedata.desc: Google Sheets/Excel organization, formulas, sorting, filtering, and structured reporting.

servicedata.title: Online Research
servicedata.desc: Topic research, product research, competitor research, and structured information summaries.

servicedata.title: Basic Data Analysis
servicedata.desc: Simple data insights using Excel formulas, pivot tables, and clear report interpretation.

servicedata.title: YouTube Script Writing
servicedata.desc: Engaging scripts with strong hooks, storytelling flow, and audience retention structure.

servicedata.title: Content & Short Video Support
servicedata.desc: Content structuring, caption writing, and short-form video workflow preparation.

experience.label: Professional Journey
experience.title: Experience &
experience.description: Roles, responsibilities, and academic foundation that shaped my professional expertise.

experiencedata.desc: Providing patient care, assisting medical teams in clinical procedures, monitoring patient conditions, and ensuring accurate healthcare documentation.
Managing health administration processes including BPJS e-Claim and P-Care systems, patient data management, and structured clinical reporting.
Working on various digital and administrative tasks such as data processing, Microsoft Office documentation, website development, graphic design, and digital content creation.

education.title: Master of Nursing
education.desc: Pursuing Master's degree in Nursing with focus on advanced nursing research, health service management, clinical leadership, and health system development.

education.title: Professional Nursing Program (Ners)
education.desc: Completed professional nursing education with intensive clinical rotations in various health service units including ICU, ER, maternity, and inpatient wards.

education.title: Bachelor of Nursing (S.Kep)
education.desc: Studied basic to advanced nursing science including patient care, medical documentation, health ethics, patient safety, and clinical practice.
